summary: Maeda has pivoted from a months-long bearish shorting campaign to explicitly calling a market bottom and anticipating higher Bitcoin prices.
narrative: After successfully shorting Ethereum throughout late 2025, his latest video declares 'The Bottom Is In,' arguing that specific market mechanics will propel BTC upward. He abandons his previous bearish stance to suggest the worst of the correction is over, advising viewers to look for buying opportunities rather than shorts.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
